DEFENDANT MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Further Respond To Defendant Further Respond To Defendant is granted in part and denied in part. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $500.00. Prevailing party prepare order and e-mail to Judge Pro Tem. Parties stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Trent Thornley Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)
